image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: NASA's Perseverance isn't joyriding — it's hunting ancient signs of life.
Context visual: Situated in Jezero Crater, this rover is on a mission to unveil the secrets of Mars' watery past.
Escalation visual: Jezero was once a lake, and scientists believe it may hold clues to ancient microbial life.
Evidence visual: Perseverance collects rock samples, caching them for future return missions to Earth.
Pattern Interrupt visual: What will these samples reveal? The answers could change everything we know about life beyond Earth.
Payoff visual: While no life has been found yet, Perseverance is paving the way for discovery.
Cta visual: Follow along for more updates on this incredible journey to Mars!
